headline: Beachhead Market Validated: Digital Marketing Agencies (10-50) Rank #1 Across 12 Segments
highlights: ✅ Scored 4.2/5.0 on weighted beachhead matrix (highest of 12 segments)
✅ Acute pain: 8-12 hrs/week manual reporting (6 hrs/week ROI = $3,600/year value)
✅ Optimal accessibility: 2-6 week sales cycles, direct access to decision-makers
✅ Strong unit economics: LTV $3,500-$5,600 >> COCA target ~$1,200
✅ Manageable competition: 3-4 vendors; differentiation via white-label + ease-of-use
✅ Positive tailwinds: 9% YoY agency growth; digital transformation driving demand
Top 3 ranked segments: (1) Digital Agencies 4.2, (2) Performance Marketing 4.0, (3) SaaS/Tech 3.9
Recommended co-beachhead: Performance Marketing Agencies (1-3 week sales cycle, highest accessibility)
Alternative markets to avoid (Phase 1): In-House Marketing (low accessibility), Healthcare/Pharma (regulatory gatekeeping)
